data.summary:
Read https://newsroom.spotify.com/2026-04-28/spotify-q1-2026-earnings/:
Spotify reported Q1 2026 earnings on April 28, 2026. The company surpassed 761 million monthly active users (MAUs), growing 12% year-over-year, and premium subscribers reached 293 million, growing 9% year-over-year. Total revenue increased 14% to €4.5 billion with gross margin improving to 33%.
Key facts:
  - Report published: April 28, 2026
  - Q1 2026 MAU: 761 million (12% Y/Y growth)
  - Q1 2026 Premium Subscribers: 293 million (9% Y/Y growth)
  - Total Revenue Q1 2026: €4.5 billion (14% Y/Y increase)
  - Gross Margin Q1 2026: 33% (~140 bps Y/Y improvement)
  - Operating Income Q1 2026: €715 million

extract.summary: Spotify reported Q1 2026 earnings on April 28, 2026. The company surpassed 761 million monthly active users (MAUs), growing 12% year-over-year, and premium subscribers reached 293 million, growing 9% year-over-year. Total revenue increased 14% to €4.5 billion with gross margin improving to 33%.
key_facts: Q1 2026 Premium Subscribers: 293 million (9% Y/Y growth)
Total Revenue Q1 2026: €4.5 billion (14% Y/Y increase)
Gross Margin Q1 2026: 33% (~140 bps Y/Y improvement)

data.answer:
# Spotify's Most Recent Quarterly Earnings: Key User Metrics (as of June 2026)

## Report at a Glance

| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| **Quarter Covered** | Q1 2026 (January – March 2026) |
| **Report Date** | **April 28, 2026** |
| **Source** | Spotify Newsroom (official press release) |

---

## Key User Metrics — Q1 2026

| Metric | Q1 2026 Figure | Year-over-Year Growth |
|---|---|---|
| **Monthly Active Users (MAUs)** | **761 million** | +12% Y/Y |
| **Premium Subscribers** | **293 million** | +9% Y/Y |

---

## Additional Financial Context [1]

- **Total Revenue:** €4.5 billion (+14% Y/Y on a constant-currency basis, +8% in reported terms)
- **Gross Margin:** ~33% (~140 basis points improvement Y/Y)
- **Operating Income:** €715 million

---

## Notes
- These figures were disclosed in Spotify's **Q1 2026 Shareholder Letter and Earnings Report**, published on **April 28, 2026** — the most recent quarterly earnings release as of June 2026 [1].
- For context, the immediately prior quarter (Q4 2025, reported February 10, 2026) showed **751 million MAUs** and **290 million Premium Subscribers** [1].

citations.title: Spotify Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings – Spotify Newsroom
citations.note: Official Spotify press release for Q1 2026 earnings, published April 28, 2026. Discloses 761M MAUs (+12% Y/Y) and 293M Premium Subscribers (+9% Y/Y).

data.confidence: high — Figures sourced directly from Spotify's official newsroom press release for Q1 2026, published April 28, 2026, and cross-referenced against search snippets from the same release.
data.open_gaps: Spotify's Q2 2026 earnings (covering April–June 2026) had not yet been reported as of the June 2026 research cutoff; those results would typically be expected in late July 2026.
